purpose: Track official CWA weather-context sources reviewed before assigning weather-type labels to radar-derived event windows.
source_policy: Weather labels must cite CWA weather maps, warnings, daily reports, or official open-data products. Radar-only morphology is not acceptable evidence.

official_sources_reviewed.finding: Sitemap exposes official warning, typhoon, weather overview, analysis chart, PDF, and latest chart pages.
Official analysis page identifies latest weather chart, surface weather chart, weekly forecast chart, and quantitative precipitation forecast products.
The current JS index lists recent surface weather charts only. Local review on 2026-07-09 observed entries from 2026-07-06 20:00 to 2026-07-09 14:00.
Official page links current weather overview and forecast PDFs such as W01.pdf, W11.pdf, and W53.pdf.
Current warning JS includes active warning content, including typhoon-related warnings on 2026-07-09, but does not provide selected event-time historical warning content.
Warning and typhoon products are official sources, but reviewed metadata/products did not expose historyAPI coverage for selected event timestamps.

needed_sources: CWA surface weather chart or daily weather overview covering 2026-06-28 afternoon-evening
events.notes: Do not classify as front, Mei-yu, typhoon outer rainband, or afternoon convection until at least one event-time official source is attached.

needed_sources: CWA surface weather chart or daily weather overview covering 2026-07-02 afternoon
CWA warning/advisory check for Chiayi County during 2026-07-02 afternoon
events.notes: Gauge observations confirm local hourly rain, but weather mechanism remains unclassified without official synoptic or warning evidence.

needed_sources: CWA surface weather chart or daily weather overview covering 2026-07-03 afternoon-evening
CWA warning/advisory check for Chiayi County during 2026-07-03 afternoon-evening
events.notes: Use this as a radar/gauge-backed heavy-rain candidate only until official weather context is attached.

next_actions: Probe candidate CWA SFCcombo image URLs once network quota is available.
If CWA historical chart images exist, attach the downloaded local ignored image path plus source URL and classify each event.
If historical chart images are unavailable, locate another official CWA daily report/archive before assigning labels.
